# daytona_sandbox_metrics (Data Source)

Reads bounded OpenTelemetry metrics for a Daytona sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_metrics" "example" {
  sandbox_id = "sandbox-id"
  from       = "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z"
  to         = "2026-01-02T04:04:05Z"

  metric_names = ["cpu.usage", "memory.usage"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `from` (String) Start of the time range as an RFC3339 timestamp.
- `sandbox_id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.
- `to` (String) End of the time range as an RFC3339 timestamp.

### Optional

- `metric_names` (List of String) Optional metric names to return.
- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `series` (Attributes List) Returned metric series. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--series))

<a id="nestedatt--series"></a>
### Nested Schema for `series`

Read-Only:

- `data_points` (Attributes List) Metric data points. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--series--data_points))
- `metric_name` (String) Metric name.

<a id="nestedatt--series--data_points"></a>
### Nested Schema for `series.data_points`

Read-Only:

- `timestamp` (String) Metric timestamp.
- `value` (Number) Metric value.
